<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Support\Configuration; use Pest\Mutate\Contracts\Mutator; class Configuration { /** * @param array<int, string> $paths * @param array<int, string> $pathsToIgnore * @param array<int, class-string<Mutator>> $mutators * @param array<int, string> $classes */ public function __construct( public readonly bool $coveredOnly, public readonly array $paths, public readonly array $pathsToIgnore, public readonly array $mutators, public readonly array $classes, public readonly bool $parallel, public readonly int $processes, public readonly bool $profile, public readonly ?float $minScore, public readonly bool $ignoreMinScoreOnZeroMutations, public readonly bool $stopOnUntested, public readonly bool $stopOnUncovered, public readonly ?string $mutationId, public readonly bool $retry, public readonly bool $everything, ) {} }
